显示 HN：Waffle – 将会话自动平铺到网格中的本机 macOS 终端

Show HN: Waffle – Native macOS terminal that auto-tiles sessions into a grid

waffle.baby 作者 olleeolleeollee 分数 32 评论 8 2026/04/11 21:40
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 一种 macOS 终端，可将每个会话自动平铺到一个窗口中。没有窗口管理。没有配置。没有安排。只需打开终端即可。下载 Waffle（免费）Apple Silicon · macOS 14+ · Native Swift
  2. 全部 + $
  3. 全部 + $
  4. 专为并行运行代理而构建零配置自动平铺打开终端，它会全屏显示。打开第二个，它分成 50/50。四个变成 2x2 网格。九变成 3x3。你从来不安排任何事情。停止寻找丢失的终端 不再需要循环浏览选项卡来查找哪个代理正在做什么。每个会话都会同时显示在屏幕上。项目颜色和组会话自动检测 git 存储库。每个项目都有自己的颜色和选项卡。三个存储库，七个代理，一击键即可过滤。没有设置仪式没有.tmux.conf。没有分割命令。没有命名会议。打开华夫饼，开始工作。快速、原生的 Swift 构建于 SwiftTerm，而不是 Electron。原生 AppKit，无浏览器引擎。任何 CLI 工具。任何代理。 Claude Code、Codex、Aider、Gemini CLI — 或者只是简单的 zsh。 Waffle 并不关心正在运行什么，它只是平铺您打开的任何内容。
  5. 键盘优先 切换存储库、缩放窗格、调整焦点 - 无需鼠标。

Original Summary

  1. A macOS terminal that auto-tiles every session into one window. No window management. No configuration. No arranging. Just open terminals. Download Waffle (free) Apple Silicon · macOS 14+ · Native Swift
  2. ALL + $
  3. ALL + $
  4. Built for running agents in parallel Zero-config auto-tiling Open a terminal, it goes fullscreen. Open a second, it splits 50/50. Four becomes a 2x2 grid. Nine becomes 3x3. You never arrange anything. Stop looking for lost terminals No more cycling through tabs to find which agent is doing what. Every session is on screen at once. Project colours and groups Sessions auto-detect git repos. Each project gets its own colour and tab. Three repos, seven agents, one keystroke to filter. No setup ceremony No .tmux.conf. No split commands. No naming sessions. Open Waffle, start working. Fast, native Swift Built on SwiftTerm, not Electron. Native AppKit, no browser engine. Any CLI tool. Any agent. Claude Code, Codex, Aider, Gemini CLI — or just plain zsh. Waffle doesn't care what's running, it just tiles whatever you open.
  5. Keyboard-first Switch repos, zoom a pane, adjust focus — no mouse required.

评论（默认中文）

replwoacause 2026/04/12 10:58
看起来真的很好看！网站也超级干净。上面的动画是怎么制作的？
Looks really nice! Super clean site too. How did you make the animation at the top?
在 HN 中查看
olleeolleeollee 2026/04/12 11:15
谢谢！很高兴你喜欢！徽标动画是带有 CSS 关键帧动画的 SVG。
Thanks! Glad you like! The logo animation is an SVG with CSS keyframe animations.
在 HN 中查看
jamesgresql 2026/04/12 06:21
这太棒了，不再丢失终端屏幕！
This is great, no more lost terminal screens!
在 HN 中查看
olleeolleeollee 2026/04/12 11:17
谢谢！如果我能做些什么来使它更有用，请告诉我。我想在下一次更新中我会研究自定义按键绑定，但如果有什么更明显的事情，我很想听听。
Thanks! Let me know if there’s anything I can do to make it more useful. I thought in the next update I’d work on custom key bindings but if there’s anything more glaring, I’d love to hear it.
在 HN 中查看
billylo 2026/04/12 01:26
喜欢这个。感谢分享！
love this. thanks for sharing!

olleeolleeollee 2026/04/12 11:20

Thank you! Give me a shout if there’s anything I can add or change that would make it more useful for you.
在 HN 中查看
throwaway290 2026/04/12 02:56
> 老实说，如果您住在 tmux，这可能不适合您，但它确实有助于加快我的工作流程。

新鲜诚实，很好。

> Honestly, if you live in tmux, this probably isn't for you but it's really helped to speed up my workflow.

Fresh honesty, nice.

在 HN 中查看
olleeolleeollee 2026/04/12 11:19
哈哈，我的意思是，自从推出这个以来，我就学到了无数的替代方案，我可能应该早点尝试一下，但对我来说，自动平铺确实是最重要的，据我所知，没有其他替代方案真的可以出于某种原因做到这一点？也许有一个很好的理由，但无论如何它适合我的工作流程
Haha, I mean ever since launching this I’m learning of a zillion alternatives I should have probably tried earlier but for me the auto tiling is really the main thing and, as far as I can see, no other alternatives really do that for some reason? Maybe there’s a good reason but it suits my workflow anyway
